title: Particles Remastered!
description: Remasters all of the available particles in minecraft that can be customized! Such as Sword swings, campfire smokes, Souls floating away and much more!
body:
# Particles Remastered! (Reborn) 2.0v
This is a Seperate update to fix the mistakes and changes made to the original "Particles Remastered!" This includes some static particles recieving Animations such as glint, flame, lava, smoke, explosions and etc.

All contents listed: (couldn't be included into gallery due to the limit on upload)

## Big Smokes!

![Campfire Smoke 4 frames.](https://i.imgur.com/hBPsIHe.gif)

## Explosions!

![BOOM, THERE GOES YOUR TOWER!](https://i.imgur.com/lrxJgbV.gif)

## Notes!

![Smaller in tune notes.](https://i.imgur.com/0zKPTyu.gif)

## Potion Effects!

![Potion effects!](https://i.imgur.com/AUtrvWX.gif)

## Critical Hit, Damage Indicator, Death sprite!

![Crit attack, Death sprite, Damage indicator (heart ripping).](https://i.imgur.com/EdpTAAX.gif)

## Bubbles!

![animated bubbles! 25 frames smoothly!](https://i.imgur.com/P6XYa9C.gif)

## Angry Villager!
*idiot, haha*

![Arrows Point downwards floating up and down!](https://i.imgur.com/Q9tSP7o.gif)

## Glint!

![Glint Shines! Like a real glint!](https://i.imgur.com/yy6LYph.gif)

## Raid Omen + Trial Omen!

![Raid Omen effect!](https://i.imgur.com/pO0FCer.gif)

![Trial Omen effect!](https://i.imgur.com/WYFpMlN.gif)

## Shine!

![shiny rotateee weee](https://i.imgur.com/tXo4ZU6.gif)

## Fireworks!

![derp](https://i.imgur.com/eLGwCyy.gif)

![Derp2](https://i.imgur.com/sNTYS4n.gif)

## Sweeping Hit!

![Sweep Hit!](https://i.imgur.com/FSul68C.gif)

## Infestation!

![Silverfish wags it's tail! instead of a random bug..](https://i.imgur.com/T3wJ1nZ.gif)




# Particles Remastered! 1.1v
Particles remastered is a Simple resource pack that smoothens out the edges of the particle textures and overall gives more saturation and "tweaks" to make the vanilla feel more great!

Features 194 files of particle remasters such as: Smoke (campfires), Souls, warden charge, Villager hurt (dark clouds) and many more!

### Campfire smoke example:
![Remastered smoke particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0928e7f70066d4eeac6ad87c202a1c30c65ff05.png)
